sections.paragraph:
πλοιάριον, ου, τό (Aristoph., X.+; Diod S 14, 30, 4; PEdg 39 [=Sb 6745], 3 [253/252 b.c.]; BGU 812, 5; PGen 14, 8; Ostraka II 1051, 4) dim. of πλοῖον, any kind of relatively small boat, small ship, boat, skiff Mk 3:9 (πλοῖον is used for the same kind of vessel 4:1; hence it is prob. no longer thought of as a dim.; this is plainly the case in Ael. Aristid. 50, 35 K.=26 p. 512 D., where there are nothing but πλοιάρια in the harbor); 4:36 v.l.; Lk 5:2 v.l. (for πλοῖα); πλοιάριον ἄλλο J 6:22; 23 (s. the text and vv.ll. with interchange of πλοῖα and πλοιάρια), 24. οἱ μαθηταὶ τῷ πλοιαρίῳ (comitative-instrum. dat.; s. Kühner-G. I 430ff. Locative, perh. instrum.: Rob. 520f; 533) 21:8.—Dalman, Arbeit VI 351–56, 363–70.—DELG s.v. πλέω. M-M.

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

PEdg PEdg = CDE., Selected Papyri—List 4

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

PGen PGen = Les Papyrus de Genève—List 4

dim. dim. = diminutive

prob. prob. = probable, probably

Ael. Aristid. Ael. Aristid. = Aelius Aristides, II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

vv.ll. vv.ll. = variae lectiones (variant readings)

dat. dat. = dative

perh. perh. = perhaps

Rob. Rob. = ATRobertson, A Grammar of the Greek NT in the Light of Historical Research—List 6

Dalman Dalman = GD., various works—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 830
